message:
feat(update): add verification and type definitions for self-update

Adds infrastructure for the self-update mechanism:

types.rs:
- UpdateManifest: Describes available updates with version, checksums
- ReleaseAsset: Individual downloadable artifact metadata
- Platform/Architecture detection for multi-platform support
- UpdateChannel: stable/beta/nightly channel support
- Version comparison utilities

verify.rs:
- Binary verification using SHA256 checksums
- Signature verification placeholders for future GPG/minisign support
- Integrity checks before replacing running binary
- Rollback capability on verification failure

This lays groundwork for secure automatic updates of rch binaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
